item.title: mortgage refinance rates today 2026: May 13, 2026
item.description: mortgage refinance rates today 2026: May 13, 2026Last Updated: May 13, 2026, 6:00 AM EST kw changes weekly in 2026. For country users, here are 5 critical updates for date_str based on price moves, new features, and country regulation shifts.
